use_cases: Submit credentials in multi-step authentication flows
Navigate between steps in onboarding processes
Trigger destructive actions with confirmation states
Handle form submission with loading/disabled states
Serve as primary or secondary call-to-action in login forms
ai_summary: A versatile button component with CVA-powered variant system (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and multiple size options. Part of a multi-step login system with proper accessibility features including focus-visible outlines and keyboard navigation support. Features smooth transitions and shadow utilities for depth, designed for authentication and form workflows in SaaS and fintech applications.
